title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama CLI and server to pull, build and run large language models locally.

title: langchain-ai/langchain (Ollama integration)
summary: LangChain Python library ships a first-party Ollama LLM wrapper for chaining, retrieval and agents.

title: ollama-js on npm
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama REST API (generate, chat, embed, pull).

title: ollama-python on PyPI
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, generate, pull, push, list, delete models.

title: ollama-webui (now Open WebUI)
summary: Feature-rich self-hosted web interface for Ollama with chat history, RAG, users, admin panel.

title: ollama4j – Java client
summary: Lightweight Java/Kotlin SDK for Ollama REST endpoints; chat, generate, pull, list, delete.

title: ollama-rb – Ruby gem
summary: Community-maintained Ruby wrapper for Ollama; supports chat, generate, embeddings.

title: ollama-cli – Go TUI client
summary: Terminal-UI Go app that wraps Ollama REST API for interactive chat sessions.

title: ollama-copilot – VS Code extension
summary: Neovim plugin that adds Ollama-powered code completion and chat sidebar.

title: chainlit/chainlit (Ollama example)
summary: Cookbook repo shows how to plug Ollama models into Chainlit conversational AI apps.

title: ollama-copilot – Copilot-style VS Code
summary: Unofficial VS Code extension bringing Ollama code suggestions inline like GitHub Copilot.

title: private-gpt with Ollama backend
summary: PrivateGPT v0.5 adds native Ollama support for fully-private RAG over documents.

title: ollama-telegram – Telegram bot
summary: Simple Python bot that forwards Telegram chats to your local Ollama instance.

title: ollama-discord – Discord bot
summary: Discord.py bot bringing Ollama models to Discord servers with slash commands.

title: ollama-helm – Kubernetes Helm chart
summary: Community Helm chart to deploy Ollama server and models on Kubernetes clusters.

title: ollama-dagger – CI module
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama containers in CI pipelines for testing LLM features.

title: ollama-rag – Minimal RAG repo
summary: Example repo showing how to combine Ollama LLM with sentence-transformers for a tiny RAG stack.

title: ollama-models – Community registry
summary: Official curated list of Modelfiles for Llama 3, Phi-3, Mistral, Gemma, CodeLlama, etc.

title: reddit/r/ollama – Discussion hub
summary: Active subreddit for sharing Ollama tips, new models, integrations and troubleshooting.

title: ollama-snap – Snapcraft package
summary: Official snap package of Ollama server for easy install on Ubuntu and other snap-enabled distros.
